name: Trout

pros.title: strong oily-fish profile makes this a very serious meat anchor
pros.explanation: Omega-3s and protein come together unusually well here.

pros.title: high-satiety protein source
pros.explanation: That is a core practical strength of meat.

pros.title: reliable complete protein delivery
pros.explanation: The category is expected to do this well.

cons.title: fat quality varies sharply by cut
cons.explanation: The category swings a lot depending on what exact version you buy.

cons.title: storage and cost can be annoying
processing can ruin an otherwise strong category
cons.explanation: Not every meat product deserves the reputation of the better cuts.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
